title: Phantom of the Range
writer: Frank Howard Clark, Oliver Drake, Randolph Bartlett
actors: Tom Tyler, Frankie Darro, Duane Thompson
plot: Duke Carlton, an actor stranded in a small western town, gets a job as a cowboy on Tim O'Brien's ranch as a reward for beating up "Flash" Corbin, a real estate agent who has been trying to swindle the rancher. A romance develops b...
